form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of five months. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into fifth behind Music Hall at this track over 1609m in a 40000CLM on November 17 at $6.56. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1609m. Last start won by 5 m as favourite (Fr1) at this track (1:52.40) beating Ever M in 30000CLM on April 1 at $1.41. Recent form hard to fault.
